failures.description: The Executor misinterpreted or incompletely used the ProductCatalogSearch result by failing to include item_id 5312063289, whose price 195.15 is greater than 194.56.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user asked for available Skateboard items with deck material=bamboo costing more than $194.56. The tool output at index 3 contained all required evidence. Prices above $194.56 were item_ids 4293355847 ($200.80), 5312063289 ($195.15), 6956751343 ($217.06), and 8176740019 ($208.60). At index 4, the Executor synthesized the answer but omitted 5312063289 despite it satisfying the threshold. This is a reasoning/filtering error over relevant tool output, not an invalid invocation or unsupported intent.
